nameMeanings.name: Romanova
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Russian, Belorussian, Bulgarian, and Macedonian: patronymic from the personal name   Roman  . Compare   Romanoff  .
Jewish (from Belarus): habitational name from the town Romanovo, now in Belarus.

History: Romanov is a name of the last ruling dinasty of Russia. The Romanov dynasty began its rule in 1613 with Michael Romanov (died 1645), and ended with the execution of Nicholas II and his family at Yekaterinburg in July 1918. The family were descended from a Muscovite boyar, Andrei Kobyla, who had emigrated in the 14th century from Prussia. They took the name from Roman Yurievich (died 1543), whose daughter Anastasia Romanovna was the first wife of Ivan the Terrible. Her brother Nikita was regent after Ivan's death, and after years of disorder Nikita's grandson Michael Romanov was elected czar in 1613.

variants.name: Romanow
meanings: German and Polish: altered form of Russian   Romanov  .
American shortened form of Polish and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic)   Romanowski  .

variants.name: Roman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Manuel, Carlos, Angel, Jorge, Miguel, Pedro, Francisco, Julio, Mario.

Spanish and Hungarian (Román); Catalan, French, English, Dutch, German, Romanian, Polish, Czech, Slovak, Ukrainian, Rusyn, Belorussian, and Croatian: from the Latin personal name Romanus, which originally meant ‘Roman’. This name was borne by several Christian saints, including a 7th-century bishop of Rouen, and was a baptismal name of the Russian prince Boris , who is venerated as a saint in the Orthodox Church. In North America, this surname is also a shortened form of Slavic patronymics like Polish Romanowicz . Compare Romano .
Americanized form of German Romann: variant of 1 above or from the ancient Germanic personal name Hrodman (see Rodeman ).

variants.name: Romanoff
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Eliahu, Elihu, Hedva.
Westernized form of Russian, Belorussian, Jewish (from Belarus), Bulgarian, and Macedonian   Romanov  .
Shortened and altered form of Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic)   Romanowski  .

nameMeanings.name: Olena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Maria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.description: "Mongols invade. Kiev falls in 1240. Novgorod and Moscow submit to Mongol ""yoke""without resisting."
Aleksandr Nevskiy successfully defends Novgorod against attack by Teutenic Knights.

en.lifeSummary: When Olena Maria Romanova was born in 1194, in Halych, Halych, Ivano-Frankivsk, Ukraine, her father, Roman “the Grand” Mstislavich Rurik, was 41 and her mother, Duchess of Owrutsch Predslawa Rjurikowna, was 34. She had at least 7 sons and 3 daughters with Michael of Chernigov. She died after 1241, in Kyiv, Kiev Uyezd, Kiev, Russian Empire.

Elle a eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles avec Michael of Chernigov. Elle est décédée après 1241, à Kyiv, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Empire russe.

ja.lifeSummary: Olena Maria Romanovaが1194年にウクライナІвано-ФранківськаГалицький районГаличで生まれた時，父Roman “the Grand” Mstislavich Rurikは41歳，母Duchess of Owrutsch Predslawa Rjurikownaは34歳であった。彼女はMichael of Chernigovとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1241年以後にРоссийская империяКиевская губернияКиевский уездКиївで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Olena Maria Romanova(이)가 1194년 우크라이나 Івано-Франківська Галицький район Галич에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roman “the Grand” Mstislavich Rurik(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Duchess of Owrutsch Predslawa Rjurikowna(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 Michael of Chernigov(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1241년 이후 Российская империя Киевская губерния Киевский уезд Київ에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Olena Maria Romanova родилась в 1194 г. в местности Галич, Галицкий район, Ивано-Франковская, Украина, её отцу по имени Roman “the Grand” Mstislavich Rurik было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Duchess of Owrutsch Predslawa Rjurikowna, 34. У неё было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери от Michael of Chernigov. Она умерла после 1241 г. в местности Киев, Киевский уезд, Киевская губерния, Российская империя.
